title: AI Dashboard Pro
description: A comprehensive AI-powered analytics dashboard featuring real-time data visualization, machine learning insights, and predictive modeling capabilities. Built with React and D3.js for stunning visualizations.

title: E-Commerce Platform
description: Full-featured e-commerce solution with cart management, payment integration, inventory tracking, and admin panel. Includes dark mode and responsive design for all devices.

title: TaskFlow App
description: Collaborative project management tool with drag-and-drop kanban boards, team collaboration features, and real-time updates using WebSockets.

title: Portfolio Generator
description: Dynamic portfolio website generator that creates personalized developer portfolios from JSON configuration files. Features multiple themes and layouts.

title: Weather Forecast App
description: Beautiful weather application with location-based forecasts, interactive maps, and severe weather alerts. Uses OpenWeatherMap API for accurate data.

title: Social Media Dashboard
description: Analytics dashboard for social media managers to track engagement, schedule posts, and analyze audience growth across multiple platforms.
